_comment: Fictional sample payload — no real data. High-risk MCP server request expected to trigger human review.
agentic_scope: Agent queries and returns customer data to AI assistant without human confirmation step between query and response
business_purpose: Enable AI customer support assistant to answer support queries using live customer database data. Support team requires real-time customer record access for escalation handling and tier-2 support workflows.
requested_permissions: Read access to customer_records table and schema inspection endpoints
credential_storage: n8n credential store (not yet migrated to Secret Manager)
